title: CellRelation
description: CellRelation: Details the index of the cells which is behind and infront of each Face.

FromCell.description: Index of the cell the Face is connected to which its normal is pointing away from.

ToCell.description: Index of the cell the Face is connected to which its normal is pointing towards.

_t.description: Optional Type descriminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
